rationale: Educ. Code §12.10125 governs when an open-enrollment charter school ceases to operate. It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.10125. OPEN-ENROLLMENT CHARTER SCHOOL NOT IN OPERATION. An open-enrollment charter school ceases to operate if:
_note: Rule text concerns charter school cessation; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
